rawAssistant: They're still flickering, but now we can see they're not just random fireflies. The pattern looks like it might be a warning – some kind of signal to anyone passing by. I've seen this sort of thing before on the north road; could be a sign that someone's left a message or even set up a makeshift campsite. If you're thinking of investigating, I'd recommend heading east from here and keeping an eye out for any signs of recent activity.
